description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted with a casual urban appearance. The figure is wearing a sleeveless top with a scoop neckline and button details, paired with straight-cut pants and simple shoes. The posture is upright, with both arms raised and extended backward in an exaggerated, unnatural manner, creating a dramatic V-shape above the head. The facial features are neutral, and the hairstyle is medium-length and straight, parted in the middle. The clothing fits closely to the body, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects. The overall form is human-like, with realistic proportions except for the unusually elongated and raised arms.
description: An adult pedestrian in casual attire, standing upright with both arms raised and extended backward in a dramatic V-shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, and both arms raised and extended backward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's backward extension, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top and pants, and the arms crossing behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the backward arm extension, and the side of the pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised and extended backward
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair parted in the middle
